TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Gluban, title = Gluban, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Gluban} }

S.FORM: = Gluban = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang gluban. 146 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 501 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 469 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 32 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq82%, Tayal8%, Bunun1%, Paiwan1%, ni rahuq na o1%. Pusu nniqan alang Pusu klegan seejiq mniq alang Gluban o Seejiq Tgdaya, tnganan naq seejiq nealang o Alang Gluban . Nniqan alang Nyusan Nan-two nsgan Jen-ay alang Hu-cu. Knlbangan Gaga gqiyan hidaw nyusan Nan-two nsgan Jen-ay ka alang Gluban, hraan hidaw o dalih alang Cung-yuan, alang Mey-yuan ni Hwey-swun rin-cang, gqiyan hidaw o lutuc nsgan Kwo-sin na Mey-rin se-cyu, hunac hraan hidaw o niqan yayung Pey-kang ka ttqiri ssiyaw, gqiyan hidaw o niqan yayung Mey-yuan, daya o niqan gggiyaq Mey-yuan, emburux balay ka alang hini. Ti-ri lnglingay Sttu. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung Kndadax Er-kaw na lutuc Cung-two kung-ru cyaw-ryo-taw(caw-tung)>127syeyn ca-taw(hunac)Nan-two>Cung-two tbiyax na elug rulu>Fen-caw ru ca-taw>Fen-caw ru>Bwo-ay ru>Tung-san ru>Cung-cng ru>Cung-tan kung-ru>Kwo-sin ru>Cang-pey ru>Cung-hwa ru>alang Gluban. Pusu klegan seejiq nealang Seejiq. Djiyun kari Kari Seejiq ni Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Muda Gaya. Pnyahan alang Alang:Kari Seejiq, dungus na kari Seejiq o alang msa. Gluban:Tmhangan seejiq tnpusu ka alang Gluban nii. Gluban, seejiq Nihung o tmhangan dha Cwan-cung-taw(Kawa NaKahara Jima), yasa niqan dha yayung(yayung Pey-kang ni yayung Mey-yuan), ga ska tay-ti o niqan yayung ciway mnuda sun dha A-pi-s yaung ka seejiq nalang, yasa niqan tru yayung ka tqiri ssiyaw alang, kiya ka mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida o tmhangan dha"Tay-cung cow Cung-taw se ", tmhangan ita naq Seejiq o Gluban msa, dungus na kari nii o sngayan na nniqun. Pusu klegan seejiq mniq alang Gluban o Seejiq Tgdaya. Seuxal han o pusu bi ga eniq Paran, dhuq saw hngkwasan 1930 idas 10 jiyax 27 siida, yaasa ini baka biyax kmlawa Tanah Tunux, kika maa tnjiyal seejiq tnpusu mniq Paran, kika klaun dha balang kana seejiq knlangan "Jyoji Paran".Hngkwasan 1931 idas 5 jiyax 6 sngari na seejiq o muri dha seejiq Nihung tnhjilan hini nniqun ka Seejiq, mniq saw mnrmuxan seejiq Nihung siida pnhyugan Cwan-cung-taw se, mniyah ka seyhu Kwo-min do klka priyux alang Gluban, tnganan naq seejiq nealang o Alang Gluban . Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Pusu pnhyugan ‚óéSapah Keysacu na Gluban (049)2941076 Nyusan Nan-to nsgan Jen-ay alang Hu-cu Min-yuey syang 50 haw. Saan rmigaw ‚óéAlang Gliban Seejiq tnpusu na Yi-su cun Nyusan Nan-to nsgan Jen-ay alang Gluban na qpruhan Se-cyu fa-cang syey-hwey o iyux pnqtaan kana saw babaw dxgal sayang, kiya ni mtutuy kana alang Gluban Yi-su cun ksun ka lnglungan dha, dmurun dha balay tduwa pseupu kana neuda nseejiq na tminun, Bi-tiyaw, cwan-cu, qmqur qqhuni ka pnrjingan dha, uxay uri o tuhuy saw lukus Seejiq sbiyaw, uuqun sbiyaw, saan tqiyan sapah, ttgsa kari Seejiq, mgrig grig ni mhrapas qsiya yayung, emphuma pnegalang, kndusan, muduh siyang, BBQ dnii uuda, pgkla kana saw seejiq bukuy mnruxan Tanah Tunux siida ka hncian lutuc laqi laqi, gashuya pstutuy ka dhyaan.
S.PHON: = gluban = gaga mniq nantows…ôn …ünajsjaŇč ka alaŇč gluban. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq**%, tajal*%, bunun*%, paiwan*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč pusu kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq mniq alaŇč gluban o s…ô…ô…üiq tgdaja, tŇčanan naq s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč o alaŇč gluban . nniqan alaŇč njusan nan-two nsgan …ü…ôn-aj alaŇč ńßu- ¶u. knlbaŇčan gaga gqijan ńßidaw njusan nan-two nsgan …ü…ôn-aj ka alaŇč gluban, ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o dalińß alaŇč ¶uŇč-juan, alaŇč m…ô-juan ni ńßw…ô-swun …ĺin- ¶aŇč, gqijan ńßidaw o lutu ¶ nsgan kwo-sin na m…ô-…ĺin s…ô- ¶ju, ńßuna ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o niqan jajuŇč p…ô-kaŇč ka ttqi…ĺi ssijaw, gqijan ńßidaw o niqan jajuŇč m…ô-juan, daja o niqan gggijaq m…ô-juan, …ômbu…ĺux balaj ka alaŇč ńßini. ti-…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj sttu. pgkla patas ¶jaw-tuŇč kndadax …ô…ĺ-kaw na lutu ¶ ¶uŇč-two kuŇč-…ĺu ¶jaw-…ĺjo-taw( ¶aw-tuŇč)>***sj…ôn ¶a-taw(ńßuna ¶)nan-two> ¶uŇč-two tbijax na …ôlug …ĺulu>*…ôn- ¶aw …ĺu ¶a-taw>*…ôn- ¶aw …ĺu>bwo-aj …ĺu>tuŇč-san …ĺu> ¶uŇč- ¶Ňč …ĺu> ¶uŇč-tan kuŇč-…ĺu>kwo-sin …ĺu> ¶aŇč-p…ô …ĺu> ¶uŇč-ńßwa …ĺu>alaŇč gluban. pusu kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq ni tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw muda gaja. pnjańßan alaŇč alaŇč:ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq, duŇčus na ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq o alaŇč msa. gluban:tmńßaŇčan s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu ka alaŇč gluban nii. gluban, s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč o tmńßaŇčan dńßa ¶wan- ¶uŇč-taw(kawa nakańßa…ĺa …üima), jasa niqan dńßa jajuŇč(jajuŇč p…ô-kaŇč ni jajuŇč m…ô-juan), ga ska taj-ti o niqan jajuŇč ¶iwaj mnuda sun dńßa a-pi-s jauŇč ka s…ô…ô…üiq nalaŇč, jasa niqan t…ĺu jajuŇč ka tqi…ĺi ssijaw alaŇč, kija ka mn…ĺmuxan tanańß tunux siida o tmńßaŇčan dńßa"taj- ¶uŇč ¶ow ¶uŇč-taw s…ô ", tmńßaŇčan ita naq s…ô…ô…üiq o gluban msa, duŇčus na ka…ĺi nii o sŇčajan na nniqun. pusu kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq mniq alaŇč gluban o s…ô…ô…üiq tgdaja. s…ôuxal ńßan o pusu bi ga …ôniq pa…ĺan, dńßuq saw ńßŇčkwasan **** idas ** …üijax ** siida, jaasa ini baka bijax kmlawa tanańß tunux, kika maa tn…üijal s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu mniq pa…ĺan, kika klaun dńßa balaŇč kana s…ô…ô…üiq knlaŇčan "…üjo…üi pa…ĺan".ńßŇčkwasan **** idas * …üijax * sŇča…ĺi na s…ô…ô…üiq o mu…ĺi dńßa s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč tnńß…üilan ńßini nniqun ka s…ô…ô…üiq, mniq saw mn…ĺmuxan s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč siida pnńßjugan ¶wan- ¶uŇč-taw s…ô, mnijańß ka s…ôńßu kwo-min do klka p…ĺijux alaŇč gluban, tŇčanan naq s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč o alaŇč gluban . pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw pusu pnńßjugan *sapańß k…ôsa ¶u na gluban (***)******* njusan nan-to nsgan …ü…ôn-aj alaŇč ńßu- ¶u min-ju…ô sjaŇč ** ńßaw. saan …ĺmigaw *alaŇč gliban s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu na ji-su ¶un njusan nan-to nsgan …ü…ôn-aj alaŇč gluban na qp…ĺuńßan s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč sj…ô-ńßw…ô o ijux pnqtaan kana saw babaw dxgal sajaŇč, kija ni mtutuj kana alaŇč gluban ji-su ¶un ksun ka lŇčluŇčan dńßa, dmu…ĺun dńßa balaj tduwa ps…ôupu kana n…ôuda ns…ô…ô…üiq na tminun, bi-tijaw, ¶wan- ¶u, qmqu…ĺ qqńßuni ka pn…ĺ…üiŇčan dńßa, uxaj u…ĺi o tuńßuj saw lukus s…ô…ô…üiq sbijaw, uuqun sbijaw, saan tqijan sapańß, ttgsa ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq, mg…ĺig g…ĺig ni mńß…ĺapas qsija jajuŇč, …ômpńßuma pn…ôgalaŇč, kndusan, muduńß sijaŇč, bbq dnii uuda, pgkla kana saw s…ô…ô…üiq bukuj mn…ĺuxan tanańß tunux siida ka ńßn ¶ian lutu ¶ laqi laqi, gasńßuja pstutuj ka dńßjaan.
S.FORM: = Gluban = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang gluban. 146 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 501 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 469 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 32 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq82%, Tayal8%, Bunun1%, Paiwan1%, ni rahuq na o1%. Pusu nniqan alang Pusu klegan seejiq mniq alang Gluban o Seejiq Tgdaya, tnganan naq seejiq nealang o Alang Gluban . Nniqan alang Nyusan Nan-two nsgan Jen-ay alang Hu-cu. Knlbangan Gaga gqiyan hidaw nyusan Nan-two nsgan Jen-ay ka alang Gluban, hraan hidaw o dalih alang Cung-yuan, alang Mey-yuan ni Hwey-swun rin-cang, gqiyan hidaw o lutuc nsgan Kwo-sin na Mey-rin se-cyu, hunac hraan hidaw o niqan yayung Pey-kang ka ttqiri ssiyaw, gqiyan hidaw o niqan yayung Mey-yuan, daya o niqan gggiyaq Mey-yuan, emburux balay ka alang hini. Ti-ri lnglingay Sttu. Pgkla patas cyaw-tung Kndadax Er-kaw na lutuc Cung-two kung-ru cyaw-ryo-taw(caw-tung)>127syeyn ca-taw(hunac)Nan-two>Cung-two tbiyax na elug rulu>Fen-caw ru ca-taw>Fen-caw ru>Bwo-ay ru>Tung-san ru>Cung-cng ru>Cung-tan kung-ru>Kwo-sin ru>Cang-pey ru>Cung-hwa ru>alang Gluban. Pusu klegan seejiq nealang Seejiq. Djiyun kari Kari Seejiq ni Tlu. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Muda Gaya. Pnyahan alang Alang:Kari Seejiq, dungus na kari Seejiq o alang msa. Gluban:Tmhangan seejiq tnpusu ka alang Gluban nii. Gluban, seejiq Nihung o tmhangan dha Cwan-cung-taw(Kawa NaKahara Jima), yasa niqan dha yayung(yayung Pey-kang ni yayung Mey-yuan), ga ska tay-ti o niqan yayung ciway mnuda sun dha A-pi-s yaung ka seejiq nalang, yasa niqan tru yayung ka tqiri ssiyaw alang, kiya ka mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida o tmhangan dha"Tay-cung cow Cung-taw se ", tmhangan ita naq Seejiq o Gluban msa, dungus na kari nii o sngayan na nniqun. Pusu klegan seejiq mniq alang Gluban o Seejiq Tgdaya. Seuxal han o pusu bi ga eniq Paran, dhuq saw hngkwasan 1930 idas 10 jiyax 27 siida, yaasa ini baka biyax kmlawa Tanah Tunux, kika maa tnjiyal seejiq tnpusu mniq Paran, kika klaun dha balang kana seejiq knlangan "Jyoji Paran".Hngkwasan 1931 idas 5 jiyax 6 sngari na seejiq o muri dha seejiq Nihung tnhjilan hini nniqun ka Seejiq, mniq saw mnrmuxan seejiq Nihung siida pnhyugan Cwan-cung-taw se, mniyah ka seyhu Kwo-min do klka priyux alang Gluban, tnganan naq seejiq nealang o Alang Gluban . Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Pusu pnhyugan ‚óéSapah Keysacu na Gluban (049)2941076 Nyusan Nan-to nsgan Jen-ay alang Hu-cu Min-yuey syang 50 haw. Saan rmigaw ‚óéAlang Gliban Seejiq tnpusu na Yi-su cun Nyusan Nan-to nsgan Jen-ay alang Gluban na qpruhan Se-cyu fa-cang syey-hwey o iyux pnqtaan kana saw babaw dxgal sayang, kiya ni mtutuy kana alang Gluban Yi-su cun ksun ka lnglungan dha, dmurun dha balay tduwa pseupu kana neuda nseejiq na tminun, Bi-tiyaw, cwan-cu, qmqur qqhuni ka pnrjingan dha, uxay uri o tuhuy saw lukus Seejiq sbiyaw, uuqun sbiyaw, saan tqiyan sapah, ttgsa kari Seejiq, mgrig grig ni mhrapas qsiya yayung, emphuma pnegalang, kndusan, muduh siyang, BBQ dnii uuda, pgkla kana saw seejiq bukuy mnruxan Tanah Tunux siida ka hncian lutuc laqi laqi, gashuya pstutuy ka dhyaan.

na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq**%, tajal*%, bunun*%, paiwan*%, ni …ĺańßuq na o*%. pusu nniqan alaŇč pusu kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq mniq alaŇč gluban o s…ô…ô…üiq tgdaja, tŇčanan naq s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč o alaŇč gluban . nniqan alaŇč njusan nan-two nsgan …ü…ôn-aj alaŇč ńßu- ¶u. knlbaŇčan gaga gqijan ńßidaw njusan nan-two nsgan …ü…ôn-aj ka alaŇč gluban, ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o dalińß alaŇč ¶uŇč-juan, alaŇč m…ô-juan ni ńßw…ô-swun …ĺin- ¶aŇč, gqijan ńßidaw o lutu ¶ nsgan kwo-sin na m…ô-…ĺin s…ô- ¶ju, ńßuna ¶ ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw o niqan jajuŇč p…ô-kaŇč ka ttqi…ĺi ssijaw, gqijan ńßidaw o niqan jajuŇč m…ô-juan, daja o niqan gggijaq m…ô-juan, …ômbu…ĺux balaj ka alaŇč ńßini. ti-…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj sttu. pgkla patas ¶jaw-tuŇč kndadax …ô…ĺ-kaw na lutu ¶ ¶uŇč-two kuŇč-…ĺu ¶jaw-…ĺjo-taw( ¶aw-tuŇč)>***sj…ôn ¶a-taw(ńßuna ¶)nan-two> ¶uŇč-two tbijax na …ôlug …ĺulu>*…ôn- ¶aw …ĺu ¶a-taw>*…ôn- ¶aw …ĺu>bwo-aj …ĺu>tuŇč-san …ĺu> ¶uŇč- ¶Ňč …ĺu> ¶uŇč-tan kuŇč-…ĺu>kwo-sin …ĺu> ¶aŇč-p…ô …ĺu> ¶uŇč-ńßwa …ĺu>alaŇč gluban. pusu kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč s…ô…ô…üiq. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq ni tlu. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw muda gaja. pnjańßan alaŇč alaŇč:ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq, duŇčus na ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq o alaŇč msa. gluban:tmńßaŇčan s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu ka alaŇč gluban nii. gluban, s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč o tmńßaŇčan dńßa ¶wan- ¶uŇč-taw(kawa nakańßa…ĺa …üima), jasa niqan dńßa jajuŇč(jajuŇč p…ô-kaŇč ni jajuŇč m…ô-juan), ga ska taj-ti o niqan jajuŇč ¶iwaj mnuda sun dńßa a-pi-s jauŇč ka s…ô…ô…üiq nalaŇč, jasa niqan t…ĺu jajuŇč ka tqi…ĺi ssijaw alaŇč, kija ka mn…ĺmuxan tanańß tunux siida o tmńßaŇčan dńßa"taj- ¶uŇč ¶ow ¶uŇč-taw s…ô ", tmńßaŇčan ita naq s…ô…ô…üiq o gluban msa, duŇčus na ka…ĺi nii o sŇčajan na nniqun. pusu kl…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq mniq alaŇč gluban o s…ô…ô…üiq tgdaja. s…ôuxal ńßan o pusu bi ga …ôniq pa…ĺan, dńßuq saw ńßŇčkwasan **** idas ** …üijax ** siida, jaasa ini baka bijax kmlawa tanańß tunux, kika maa tn…üijal s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu mniq pa…ĺan, kika klaun dńßa balaŇč kana s…ô…ô…üiq knlaŇčan "…üjo…üi pa…ĺan".ńßŇčkwasan **** idas * …üijax * sŇča…ĺi na s…ô…ô…üiq o mu…ĺi dńßa s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč tnńß…üilan ńßini nniqun ka s…ô…ô…üiq, mniq saw mn…ĺmuxan s…ô…ô…üiq nińßuŇč siida pnńßjugan ¶wan- ¶uŇč-taw s…ô, mnijańß ka s…ôńßu kwo-min do klka p…ĺijux alaŇč gluban, tŇčanan naq s…ô…ô…üiq n…ôalaŇč o alaŇč gluban . pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw pusu pnńßjugan *sapańß k…ôsa ¶u na gluban (***)******* njusan nan-to nsgan …ü…ôn-aj alaŇč ńßu- ¶u min-ju…ô sjaŇč ** ńßaw. saan …ĺmigaw *alaŇč gliban s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu na ji-su ¶un njusan nan-to nsgan …ü…ôn-aj alaŇč gluban na qp…ĺuńßan s…ô- ¶ju *a- ¶aŇč sj…ô-ńßw…ô o ijux pnqtaan kana saw babaw dxgal sajaŇč, kija ni mtutuj kana alaŇč gluban ji-su ¶un ksun ka lŇčluŇčan dńßa, dmu…ĺun dńßa balaj tduwa ps…ôupu kana n…ôuda ns…ô…ô…üiq na tminun, bi-tijaw, ¶wan- ¶u, qmqu…ĺ qqńßuni ka pn…ĺ…üiŇčan dńßa, uxaj u…ĺi o tuńßuj saw lukus s…ô…ô…üiq sbijaw, uuqun sbijaw, saan tqijan sapańß, ttgsa ka…ĺi s…ô…ô…üiq, mg…ĺig g…ĺig ni mńß…ĺapas qsija jajuŇč, …ômpńßuma pn…ôgalaŇč, kndusan, muduńß sijaŇč, bbq dnii uuda, pgkla kana saw s…ô…ô…üiq bukuj mn…ĺuxan tanańß tunux siida ka ńßn ¶ian lutu ¶ laqi laqi, gasńßuja pstutuj ka dńßjaan.
